title: Smoothie Maker

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"put it in the blender" on the other
sections.middleText2: appliance controller connect: wired or wireless switch blender smoothie ingredients

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Hold up one ingredient at a time. 
2. If the switch user presses "next," put it down and show the next one. 
3. If they press "put it in the blender," place it into the blender. 
4. When all chosen ingredients are in the blender, the switch user can press the switch connected to the appliance controller to blend the smoothie.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through ingredients. Then use an appliance controller to turn the blender on.
